title: Newest Collection – Picnic in the Park!
excerpt: Can you believe it’s that time again for a new collection with American Crafts to be revealed? I am so excited about this brightness that will starting shipping in early February. Also we will be doing some fun giveaways in…
body: Can you believe it’s that time again for a new collection with American Crafts to be revealed? I am so excited about this brightness that will starting shipping in early February. Also we will be doing some fun giveaways in the next few weeks. I’ll be at Creativation soon and can’t wait to show you more of this collection from the booth!
